description: Complete frontend overhaul to achieve an industry-grade, premium dark UI inspired by Leonardo.ai. Dark-only theme, rich animations (parallax, particles, scroll reveals), glassmorphism effects, and a comprehensive component library with design tokens.

userStories.title: Design Tokens Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need centralized design tokens so all components use consistent values.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/styles/tokens.ts with color palette: bg (#0a0a0a, #111, #1a1a1a), text (white hierarchy), accents (violet-500 #8b5cf6, cyan-500 #06b6d4)
Add border tokens: subtle (rgba 0.06), default (0.1), strong (0.15)
Add glow effects: glow-primary, glow-cyan with rgba values
Create src/styles/animations.ts with duration (fast 200ms, normal 300ms, slow 500ms) and easing presets
Update tailwind.config.ts to extend theme with custom tokens
Create CSS custom properties in globals.css for all tokens

userStories.title: Global Dark Theme Styles
userStories.description: As a user, I want the entire app to use the new dark theme consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Update globals.css with dark color scheme from tokens
Remove all light mode styles and theme toggle logic
Update default text color to white with secondary gray hierarchy
Add Inter font family via Google Fonts or next/font
Remove ThemeProvider or set to dark-only
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Animation Utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reusable animation utilities for consistent motion.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/animations.ts with Framer Motion variants
Add variants: fadeIn, fadeUp, slideInLeft, slideInRight, scaleIn
Add staggerContainer variant for staggered children
Create useScrollReveal hook using Intersection Observer
Hook returns ref and isVisible boolean
Add useReducedMotion hook to check prefers-reduced-motion

userStories.title: Button Component Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want buttons with gradient backgrounds, glow effects, and smooth hover animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Variants: primary (violet gradient #8b5cf6 to #6366f1), secondary (ghost), outline, danger
Primary button has box-shadow glow on hover (0 0 20px rgba(139,92,246,0.4))
Add scale(0.98) transform on click/active state
Add loading prop with spinner icon
Add disabled state with reduced opacity
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Input Component Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want dark-styled inputs with subtle borders and focus glow.
acceptanceCriteria: Focus state: violet border (#8b5cf6) with subtle glow
Error state: red border (#ef4444) with error message below
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Select/Dropdown Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want dropdown menus matching the dark theme with smooth animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Trigger styled like Input (dark bg, subtle border)
Dropdown menu: bg #1a1a1a, border rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rounded-lg
Support for icon prefix in options
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Card Component with Glassmorphism
userStories.description: As a user, I want content cards with glassmorphism effect and hover animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Hover: border glow effect (optional violet tint)
Support header, body, footer slots via children or props
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Badge/Pill Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want status badges and pills for tags and labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Variants: default (gray), success (green), warning (amber), error (red), info (blue), accent (violet)
Sizes: sm (text-xs px-2 py-0.5), md (text-sm px-2.5 py-1)
Dark background tints with colored text (e.g., bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-400)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Toggle/Switch Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want toggle switches with violet accent color.
acceptanceCriteria: Knob: white circle with smooth slide transition (200ms)
Support label prop with left or right position
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Modal/Dialog Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want modals with dark overlay, glassmorphism, and smooth animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Modal body: glassmorphism (rgba bg, blur, border)
Close X button in top-right with hover opacity change
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Tabs Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want tab navigation matching Leonardo.ai's style.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab bar: subtle bg #111, rounded-lg, p-1
Active tab: bg #1a1a1a, text-white, subtle shadow
Active indicator animates between tabs (layoutId or CSS)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Tooltip Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want informative tooltips with dark styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Positions: top, bottom, left, right (default top)
Fade in animation (150ms) with slight translateY
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Navigation Header Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want a sleek navigation header with glassmorphism.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo with subtle scale hover effect
Nav links: text-secondary, hover:text-white with underline slide animation
Mobile: hamburger menu with slide-in drawer

userStories.title: Footer Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dark footer consistent with the design system.

Social icons with hover scale/glow effect

userStories.title: Sidebar Component

acceptanceCriteria: Nav items: icon + label, label hides when collapsed
Active item: bg violet-500/10 text-violet-400 with left border accent

userStories.title: Page Layout Wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a consistent page layout component.
acceptanceCriteria: Max-width container (1280px default) with auto margins
Scroll-to-top button that appears after scrolling

userStories.title: Scroll Reveal Animations
userStories.description: As a user, I want content to animate in as I scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: variant (fadeUp, fadeIn, slideLeft, slideRight), delay, threshold
Animation triggers once when element enters viewport
Support staggerChildren prop for container with multiple items
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Parallax Effect Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want parallax scrolling effects on hero sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: speed (0.5 = slower, 1.5 = faster than scroll)
Uses transform: translateY for GPU acceleration
Smooth performance (requestAnimationFrame or Framer Motion useScroll)
Works on images and content blocks
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Particle Background Effect
userStories.description: As a user, I want subtle animated particles in hero sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Constellation effect: particles connect with lines when close
Low CPU impact (limit particles, use canvas)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Gradient Mesh Background
userStories.description: As a user, I want animated gradient mesh backgrounds like Leonardo.ai.
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple gradient blobs that slowly drift/morph
CSS animation or Framer Motion for blob movement
Blur filter on blobs for soft effect
Low performance impact (CSS preferred over JS)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Page Transition Animations
userStories.description: As a user, I want smooth transitions between pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Create page transition wrapper using Framer Motion AnimatePresence
Fade transition between route changes (opacity 0 to 1)
Loading indicator during navigation if needed
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Hover Micro-interactions
userStories.description: As a user, I want delightful micro-interactions on interactive elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Buttons: scale(1.02) on hover, scale(0.98) on press
Cards: translateY(-4px) + shadow increase on hover
Links: underline slides in from left on hover
Icon buttons: subtle rotation or scale on hover
Add these as utility classes or component defaults
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Landing Page Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want a stunning landing page with rich animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Headline with gradient text (cyan to violet)
CTA buttons using new Button component with glow
Feature section with Cards + ScrollReveal stagger
Testimonials with card carousel or grid

Only one item open at a time (optional prop)

userStories.title: 404 Page Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want a creative 404 page.

userStories.title: Auth Pages Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want polished authentication pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Login and Register pages with centered Card layout

userStories.title: Dashboard/Profile Pages Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want dashboard pages with sidebar and cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Content area with Cards for sections
Stat cards with subtle number animations
Tables styled with dark theme (dark rows, subtle borders)

userStories.title: Skeleton Loading Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want smooth loading states throughout.
acceptanceCriteria: Shimmer animation: gradient moving left to right
Dark colors: bg #1a1a1a with lighter shimmer
Variants: text (single line), card, avatar (circle), button

userStories.title: Toast Notification System
userStories.description: As a user, I want styled toast notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark background with colored left border

userStories.title: Icon System Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a consistent icon system.
acceptanceCriteria: Color inherits from text color by default
Export commonly used icons from single file
Document icon usage in README or docs

userStories.title: Reduced Motion Support
userStories.description: As a user with motion sensitivity, I want animations to respect my preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Update all animation components to check this hook
Page transitions: instant instead of animated

userStories.title: Component Documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need documentation for the component library.
acceptanceCriteria: Document all components with props table
Include usage examples for each component
Include guidelines for when to use each component

userStories.title: Performance Optimization
userStories.description: As a user, I want animations to be smooth without jank.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit animations: use transform/opacity only where possible
Lazy load ParticleBackground and heavy animation components
Reduce particle count on mobile devices

userStories.title: Final Visual QA Pass
userStories.description: As a user, I want all pages to be pixel-perfect and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Review all pages for visual consistency
Check spacing matches design tokens throughout
Verify color usage is consistent (no off-brand colors)
Verify all pages in browser using dev-browser skill

nonGoals: E2E test updates for new components
